Video.summary: Tyrone reveals Iafa's DNA test results and helps her explore her heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet Iafa Almeida Cac

Video.summary: Using cream, sunflower oil and cherry tomatoes from the market, Amanda makes a pasta recipe and an indulgent dessert.
Video.title: Cream, Sunflower Oil & Cherry Tomatoes

Video.summary: Tyrone surprises Bianca with her DNA results and helps her explore her newly-found heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet Bianca Osbourne

Video.summary: Tyrone surprises PJ Kerr with his DNA results; he also helps him explore his newfound heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet PJ Kerr

Video.summary: Spencer shares fish recipes.
Video.title: Fish on the Grill

Video.summary: Spencer offers tips and tricks for preparing barbeque treats.
Video.title: Bananas for Barbeque

Video.summary: Juan Pablo Gonzalez provides a taste of Venezuelan home cooking with traditional recipes from a comforting, hearty squash soup to a sweet passion fruit custard.
Video.title: Traditional Venezuelan Recipes

Video.summary: Venezuelan-born Juan Pablo Gonzalez shows the versatility of corn and prepares sweet and savoury dishes with this traditional ingredient.
Video.title: Venezuelan Corn Recipes

Video.summary: Chef Luis Valenzuela takes viewers on a culinary tour of the Baja region of Mexico with sweet and savory flavors from the beach, to the mountains and back again.
Video.title: Baja Dishes

Video.summary: Chef Luis Tigretón Leon cooks up three succulent dishes that sure to please any garlic lover.
Video.title: Ajillo (Garlic)

Video.summary: Plantain has a sweet reputation, but Venezuelan-born host Juan Pablo Gonzalez shows that banana's cousin also has a savory side.
Video.title: Plantain Recipes

Video.summary: Master traditional Mexican tacos with Chef Luis Valenzuela who shares his secret to smoky and juicy pollo (chicken) tacos.
Video.title: Mexican Street Food

Video.summary: Bring the heat to the kitchen with Chef Luis Valenzuela as he shares the diversity of chilies in four different recipes.
Video.title: Chilies, Chilies, Chilies!

Video.summary: Passionate cook Juan Pablo Gonzalez introduces the arepa, a Venezuelan specialty, and shows four different and delicious fillings.
Video.title: Arepas: Venezuela's National Bread

Video.summary: Spanish host Luis Tigretón Leon shares his take on four traditional dishes from the Basque region.
Video.title: Spanish Coastal Recipes

Video.summary: Chef Luis Valenzuela fries up classic Mexican bean recipes, proving that the side dish can also be the main attraction.
Video.title: Traditional Mexican Beans

Video.summary: Chef Luis Leon shows why trout and ham is the new surf and turf.
Video.title: Spain's Specialty: Pork

Video.summary: Chef Luis Tigretón Leon shows four traditional mouth-watering tapas dishes.
Video.title: Spanish Tapas

Video.summary: Inspired by flaky, buttery and chocolaty dishes, host Vanessa cooks up four classic French recipes that'll have you saying oh la la.
Video.title: French Brunch

Video.summary: Chef Craig Wong celebrates the tastes of India and the USA and creates delicious dishes combining their cuisines.
Video.title: USA + India

Video.summary: Chef Craig Wong celebrates the cuisine of Iceland and Jamaica.
Video.title: Iceland + Jamaica

Video.summary: Chef Craig Wong combines the tastes of Ireland and Japan to create delicious pub food fare.
Video.title: Ireland + Japan

Video.summary: Four chefs turn a French classic on its head.
Video.title: Cassoulet

Video.summary: The youngest and first Indigenous woman to ever compete on Top Chef Canada explores each of the 12 Zodiac signs and their connections to food.
Video.title: Spring Special

Video.summary: Chef and writer Zach cooks his signature brand of over-the-top, calorically dense comfort food.
Video.title: Chicken Parmesan

Video.summary: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik show that food really is the language of love.
Video.title: Fancy Fast Food

Video.summary: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik show that food really is the language of love.
Video.title: Date Night

Video.summary: Hibachi-style cooking comes home with bold flavors, high heat, and modern flair.
Video.title: Hibachi at Home

Video.summary: Recipes from Taste Canada award-winning cookbooks, highlighting unique food.
Video.title: Cook the Books

Video.summary: Steak perfection is achieved through seared crust, tenderness, and precise griddle cooking.
Video.title: Searing Steak Perfection

Video.summary: Recipes from Taste Canada award-winning cookbooks, highlighting unique food.
Video.title: Cook the Books
